paper_title: Large Language Models Encode Clinical Knowledge
evaluation_method: Multiple-choice question answering evaluated via accuracy. MultiMedQA combines six existing medical QA datasets (MedQA, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, MMLU clinical topics, LiveQA, MedicationQA) plus HealthSearchQA. For the multiple-choice subsets (MedQA, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, MMLU), the model selects from candidate answer options and accuracy is computed as the fraction of correctly answered questions. For open-ended subsets, a human evaluation framework scores answers along axes of factuality, comprehension, reasoning, possible harm, and bias.
